docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOYTAK, RICHARD WOYTAK, LYDIA AS TO DEFENDANT RODERICK, GENE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RODERICK, GENE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RODERICK, GENE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOYTAK, RICHARD WOYTAK, LYDIA COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ALL PARTIES PRESENT. JUDGMENT REACHED BY STIPULATION. JUDGMENT WAS NOT PUT ON RECORD BUT WAS MEMORALIZED IN A WRITTEN AGREEMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES. THE SIGNED AGREEMENT IS IN THE DOCKET IN THIS CASE, DEFENDANT, GENE RODERICK, STATED TO THE COURT, HE UNDERSTOOD AND AGREED TO ALL TERMS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODERICK, GENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 550 LEAVENWORTH STREET, #27, SAN FRANCISCO $1,685.64 RENT, $450.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,245.64, STAYED UNTIL OCT-10-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT, GENE RODERICK, MOVES FROM 550 LEAVENWORTH, #27, SAN FRANCISCO, BY OCT. 10, 1994, 6PM, PLAINTIFFS, RICHARD WOYTAK AND LYDIA WOYTAK WILL WAIVE RENT AND DAMAGES THROUGH OCT. 10, 1994.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODERICK, GENE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $14.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOYTAK, RICHARD WOYTAK, LYDIA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RODERICK, GENE
